S1.name: lead-model-and-decider-role
S1.title: Lead model + Decider role
S1.description: Change frontmatter model from opus to sonnet; replace the three-role team composition (Planner/Architect/Verifier) in Step 4 with a single Decider teammate role block (Opus, response types RETRY/ESCALATE/ACCEPT/REJECT).

S2.name: planning-via-direct-subagent
S2.title: Planning via direct subagent
S2.description: Rewrite the planning phase: lead spawns base:story-planner directly via the Agent tool, passing spec/exploration/architecture paths; lead reads stories.json directly; if gaps need judgment, lead consults Decider via SendMessage rather than spawning another planner teammate.

in_scope: Step 4 'Planning phase' subsection or Step 5 planning step

S3.name: per-story-implementation-subagent
S3.title: Per-story implementation subagent
S3.description: Rewrite Step 5 implementation loop so that for each pending story the lead spawns a fresh base:integration-architect via the Agent tool with no result.json or artifacts from prior stories. No persistent architect teammate; no SendMessage to an architect role.

S4.name: per-story-verification-subagents
S4.title: Per-story verification subagents
S4.description: Rewrite Step 5 verification block so that the lead spawns base:verification-examiner subagents per question (parallel where independent) after each integration-architect completes. No persistent verifier teammate; no SendMessage to a verifier role.

S5.name: decision-routing-and-crash-recovery
S5.title: Decision routing + crash recovery
S5.description: Add fast-path rules (lead handles autonomously) and escalation triggers (Decider consulted) to Step 5; rewrite Crash Recovery to instruct recreation of the Decider teammate only.
